title: Sporelight
description: Adds a new mob and some moss related features!
body:
A small mod that adds some features related to moss and a new entity, the **Sporelight**!

**Feature list**:
- The Sporelight mob, which spawns in the Lush caves and drops moss balls when flying around or when clicked with a brush
- Moss balls: they can be thrown like snowballs aswell as placed down as moss layers
- Moss layers: they can be placed down on the sides of blocks and provide an easy way to decorate your builds with moss! (Edible for all you moss eaters! ^^)
